benchmarks.name: FloatArray add
benchmarks.description: Elementwise add two FloatArrays and return a new array.

benchmarks.name: FloatArray sum
benchmarks.description: Sum all elements of one FloatArray.

implementations.name: Lean nat_loop_get!
implementations.code:
def floatArrayAdd.nat_loop_get! (xs ys : FloatArray) : FloatArray := Id.run do
  let mut out := FloatArray.emptyWithCapacity xs.size
  for h : i in 0...xs.size do
    out := out.push (xs[i] + ys[i]!)
  return out

implementations.name: Lean usize_loop_get!
implementations.code:
def floatArrayAdd.usize_loop_get! (xs ys : FloatArray) : FloatArray := Id.run do
  let mut out := FloatArray.emptyWithCapacity xs.size
  for (i : USize) in 0...(xs.size.toUSize) do
    out := out.push (xs[i]! + ys[i]!)
  return out

implementations.name: Lean foreach_zip
implementations.code:
def floatArrayAdd.foreach_zip (xs ys : FloatArray) : FloatArray := Id.run do
  let mut out := FloatArray.emptyWithCapacity xs.size
  let mut i := 0
  for x in xs do
    out := out.push (x + ys[i]!)
    i := i + 1
  return out

implementations.name: C double malloc_loop
Lean nat_rec
implementations.code:
def floatArraySum.nat_rec (xs : FloatArray) : Float :=
  go 0 0
where
  go (i : Nat) (s : Float) : Float :=
    if h : i < xs.size then
      go (i+1) (s + xs[i])
    else
      s

implementations.name: Lean usize_rec
implementations.code:
partial def floatArraySum.usize_rec (xs : FloatArray) : Float :=
  go 0 0
where
  go (i : USize) (s : Float) : Float :=
    if h : i.toNat < xs.size then
      go (i+1) (s + xs.uget i h)
    else
      s

implementations.name: Lean foreach_loop
implementations.code:
def floatArraySum.foreach_loop (xs : FloatArray) : Float := Id.run do
  let mut s := 0
  for x in xs do
    s := s + x
  return s

implementations.name: Lean nat_loop
implementations.code:
def floatArraySum.nat_loop (xs : FloatArray) : Float := Id.run do
  let mut s := 0
  for h : i in 0...xs.size do
    s := s + xs[i]
  return s

implementations.name: Lean usize_loop_get!
implementations.code:
def floatArraySum.usize_loop_get! (xs : FloatArray) : Float := Id.run do
  let mut s := 0
  for (i : USize) in 0...(xs.size.toUSize) do
    s := s + xs[i]!
  return s
